# haulage-uk-compliance-mcp

> UK Operator Licence, tachograph, drivers' hours, DVSA roadside checks for UK haulage operators and 3.5T+ goods vehicles.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- check_operator_licence
- calculate_drivers_hours
- tachograph_audit
- vehicle_safety_check
- road_user_levy_check

## Install
```
pip install haulage-uk-compliance-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/haulage-uk-compliance-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
